prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic portrait of the goddess of opportunity shown from the upper body in a three-quarter back view, looking over her shoulder against a dramatic cloudy sunset sky. She has a mostly shaved bald head with only one long dark forelock of hair hanging forward on the front side of her head, symbolizing that opportunity can only be grabbed from the front. Her face is intentionally obscured by a large opaque warm brown square covering the central face area. She wears an elegant ancient Greco-Roman inspired white draped gown with an open back, flowing translucent fabric over the shoulders, and ornate gold trim. Add luxurious gold jewelry: a dangling gold earring, delicate layered gold chains across the bare back, an ornate gold armband around the upper arm, and decorative gold shoulder details. Use soft golden-hour rim lighting, warm highlights on skin and fabric, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, high-fashion mythological editorial styling, ethereal atmosphere, vertical composition, ultra-detailed, natural proportions, 85mm lens look, cinematic color grading, no text.
